case_title: ALIDA KAY VS. MARIO ANTONIO SULUB ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 61730836)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAY, ALIDA SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO THE ESTATE OF FREDERICK KAY, DECEASED AS TO DEFENDANT SULUB, MARIO ANTONIO CEBALLOS, GABRIEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-02-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-01-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-10-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2017 CONTINUED TO SEP-13-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-13-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100023350) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAY, ALIDA SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO THE ESTATE OF FREDERICK KAY, DECEASED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2017 CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-31-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT [CONDITIONAL]; (TRANSACTION ID # 100030127) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAY, ALIDA SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO THE ESTATE OF FREDERICK KAY, DECEASED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE JAN-30-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-12-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
